score_evidence: Active gene locus uses open paired DNA curves, regulatory beads, and protein markers instead of plain primitives.
RNA polymerase is a lumpy multi-subunit marker and nascent RNA is an organic squiggle curve.
mRNA export path remains thin and readable through a selected pore without covering the nucleus.
required_fixes: Before final Roblox import, convert curve-based RNA/path elements into MeshParts or Beam/Attachment equivalents.
Tune emissive material intensity in Studio so the action layer stays anatomical rather than decorative.
